memory_top_k.name: Memories per turn
memory_top_k.hint: How many long-term memories to recall and inject into the LLM context each turn

zh.name: 每轮召回条数
zh.hint: 每轮注入 LLM 上下文的长期记忆条数

memory_inject_max_chars.name: Max memory context chars
memory_inject_max_chars.hint: Hard cap on the memory + profile block size injected per turn (0 = unlimited)

zh.name: 记忆注入字符上限
zh.hint: 每轮注入的记忆 + 画像总块大小上限（0 = 不限制）

enable_vector_search.name: Enable vector search
enable_vector_search.hint: Use sqlite-vec for hybrid (FTS5 + vector) retrieval. Requires the sqlite-vec extension; falls back to FTS5-only when unavailable.

zh.name: 启用向量检索
zh.hint: 使用 sqlite-vec 进行向量 + FTS5 混合检索。需安装 sqlite-vec 扩展；未安装时自动回退到纯 FTS5。

vector_dim.name: Vector dimension
vector_dim.hint: Embedding dimension when vector search is enabled (must match your embedder)

zh.name: 向量维度
zh.hint: 启用向量检索时的嵌入维度（必须与 embedder 输出一致）

decay_enabled.name: Memory decay
decay_enabled.hint: Enable retention-score-based decay and garbage collection of low-value memories

zh.name: 启用记忆衰减
zh.hint: 按保留分数对低价值记忆做衰减 + 自动回收

decay_interval_days.name: Decay cycle interval (days)
decay_interval_days.hint: How often the full forgetting cycle runs

zh.name: 衰减周期间隔（天）
zh.hint: 完整遗忘周期的运行间隔

gc_importance_threshold.name: GC importance threshold
gc_importance_threshold.hint: Facts with importance ≤ this value AND unaccessed for gc_unaccessed_days will be archived

zh.name: GC 重要性阈值
zh.hint: importance ≤ 此值且超过 gc_unaccessed_days 未访问的事实将被归档

gc_unaccessed_days.name: GC unaccessed days
gc_unaccessed_days.hint: Memories unaccessed this many days become eligible for garbage collection

zh.name: GC 未访问天数
zh.hint: 超过此天数未访问的记忆将成为 GC 候选

hippocampus_enabled.name: Hippocampus (async fact extractor)
hippocampus_enabled.hint: Run a background fact-extraction pass after every assistant turn. Uses the configured fast LLM. Disable to save tokens, but the LLM must then call memory_add explicitly. ⚠️ Privacy: the hippocampus sees the user's latest message and the assistant's reply.

zh.name: 海马体（异步事实提取）
zh.hint: 每轮回复后跑一次后台事实提取（用配置的 fast LLM）。关闭以节省 token，但 LLM 需主动调用 memory_add。⚠️ 隐私：海马体会看到用户最新消息和助手回复。

hippocampus_model_uuid.name: Hippocampus model
hippocampus_model_uuid.hint: Leave empty to use the configured default fast LLM. Pick a specific model only if you want to pin the extractor to it.

zh.name: 海马体模型
zh.hint: 留空使用默认 fast LLM；仅当需固定特定模型用于提取时再选择。

hippocampus_max_inflight.name: Hippocampus max concurrent calls
hippocampus_max_inflight.hint: Cap on concurrent in-flight hippocampus passes. Excess turns are dropped (best-effort).

zh.name: 海马体最大并发数
zh.hint: 同时进行中的海马体提取数上限。超额的轮次会被丢弃（尽力而为）。

hippocampus_skip_keywords.name: Hippocampus skip keywords
hippocampus_skip_keywords.hint: If the user's latest message contains any of these, the hippocampus skips that turn entirely (privacy guard).

zh.name: 海马体跳过关键词
zh.hint: 用户最新消息含其中任一关键词时，海马体跳过该轮（隐私保护）。

skills_dir.name: Skills directory
skills_dir.hint: Path to the skills directory. Defaults to data/skills/. Each skill is a subfolder containing SKILL.md (recommended) or manifest.json + instruction.md (legacy).

zh.name: 技能目录
zh.hint: 技能根目录，默认 data/skills/。每个技能是一个子文件夹，含 SKILL.md（推荐）或 manifest.json + instruction.md（旧格式）。

disabled_skills.name: Disabled skills
disabled_skills.hint: List of skill names to disable (won't be registered as LLM tools). Example: ["tarot_reading"]

zh.name: 已禁用的技能
zh.hint: 不注册为 LLM 工具的技能名列表。例如：["tarot_reading"]

enable_slash_commands.name: Enable slash commands
enable_slash_commands.hint: Allow users to trigger skills via /command. When disabled, skills can only be triggered by the LLM.

zh.name: 启用斜杠命令
zh.hint: 允许用户通过 /command 触发技能；关闭时只能由 LLM 触发。

webui_port.name: Memory WebUI port
webui_port.hint: Port for the memory management WebUI (0 = disabled, valid range: 1-65535). Example: 8765

zh.name: 记忆 WebUI 端口
zh.hint: 记忆管理 WebUI 的端口（0 = 关闭，有效范围 1-65535）。例：8765

webui_host.name: Memory WebUI host
webui_host.hint: Bind address for the memory WebUI. Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access.

zh.name: 记忆 WebUI 绑定地址
zh.hint: WebUI 监听地址。仅本机访问使用 127.0.0.1。

webui_token.name: Memory WebUI token
webui_token.hint: Access token for the memory WebUI (empty = no authentication; only safe for local access).

zh.name: 记忆 WebUI 访问令牌
zh.hint: WebUI 的 Bearer 鉴权令牌；留空 = 不鉴权（仅本机访问时安全）。
